system_metadata.name: Gold V1 — H4 Pullback in Trend
system_metadata.design_principle: Simple enough to execute on paper. Rigorous enough to validate statistically.

uptrend_conditions_ALL_required: Most recent swing low is higher than the previous swing low
Most recent swing high is higher than the previous swing high
downtrend_conditions_ALL_required: Most recent swing high is lower than the previous swing high
Most recent swing low is lower than the previous swing low

uptrend_pullback_zones: Most recent broken resistance level (S/R flip)
50% retracement of the most recent impulse leg
downtrend_pullback_zones: Most recent broken support level (S/R flip)
50% retracement of the most recent down leg

pullback_invalidation.uptrend: Price closes below the previous H4 swing low → trend broken, return to Step 1
pullback_invalidation.downtrend: Price closes above the previous H4 swing high → trend broken, return to Step 1

long_triggers: Hammer (lower wick > 2x body, close in upper third)
short_triggers: Shooting star (upper wick > 2x body, close in lower third)
step_3_entry_trigger.expiration: If no trigger within 3 H4 candles (12 hours), pullback is invalid. Return to Step 2.

step_4_stop_loss.long_trade: Low of the pullback swing minus 0.3% of current price
step_4_stop_loss.short_trade: High of the pullback swing plus 0.3% of current price
step_4_stop_loss.immutable_rule: Stop loss is NEVER moved further from entry. Only to breakeven or in direction of profit.

step_5_take_profit.target_1: Most recent swing high (longs) or swing low (shorts)
step_5_take_profit.target_2: Measured move — previous impulse leg magnitude projected from pullback low/high

execution.at_T1: Close 50% of position. Move stop to breakeven.
execution.trailing_remainder: Trail stop at most recent H4 swing low (longs) or swing high (shorts)

step_6_position_sizing.formula: Position Size (oz) = (Account Equity × 0.01) / abs(Entry Price − Stop Price)

step_7_no_trade_conditions: Major news (FOMC, NFP, CPI) within 2 hours
R:R to Target 1 is less than 1.5:1

phase_1_paper.objective: Verify rules are executable. NOT to prove profitability.
pass_criteria: Zero behavioral errors (trades outside the rules)

phase_2_small_live.objective: Measure preliminary edge and execution quality

phase_3_full_validation.position_size: 0.5% risk, then 1% after 200 trades if positive
phase_3_full_validation.if_fails: Stop live trading. Analyze failure mode. Adjust rules. Restart Phase 1.
